markdownRemark.html:
Awesome asyncio

A carefully curated list of awesome Python asyncio frameworks, libraries, software and resources.

The Python asyncio module introduced to the standard library with Python 3.4 provides infrastructure for writing single-threaded concurrent code using coroutines, multiplexing I/O access over sockets and other resources, running network clients and servers, and other related primitives.

Asyncio is not really a brand-new technology however it appears to be very trending since a few years - especially in the Python community and with the release of Python 3.4 in March 2014. Thus, it's pretty hard to keep yourself up-to-date with the most awesome packages out there. Find some of those awesome packages here and if you are missing one we count on you to create an Issue or a Pull Request with your suggestion.

⚠️ Looking for help to maintain this

Since quite some time I'm unable to give this repository the love it deserves. Therefore, I'm looking for someone knowledgable of the Python ecosystem and community to help me maintain this repository. This would include to review PRs and in general bring this repository up to date again.

If you are interested, please drop me a quick email at tuxtimo@gmail.com and tell me your motiviation :)

Web Frameworks

Libraries to build web applications.

  • aiohttpstars12.9k - Http client/server for asyncio (PEP-3156).
  • sanicstars16.5k - Python 3.5+ web server that's written to go fast.
  • Quart - An asyncio web microframework with the same API as Flask.
  • Viborastars5.7k - Performant web framework inspired by Flask.
  • cirrinastars32 - Opinionated asynchronous web framework based on aiohttp.
  • autobahnstars2.4k - WebSocket and WAMP supporting asyncio and Twisted, for clients and servers.
  • websocketsstars4.2k - A library for building WebSocket servers and clients in Python with a focus on correctness and simplicity.
  • Tornado - Performant web framework and asynchronous networking library.
  • Japronto!stars8.6k - Experimental http toolkit built on top of uvloop and picohttpparser.
  • Starlettestars7.5k - A lightweight ASGI framework/toolkit for building high performance services.
  • uvicornstars5.7k - The lightning-fast ASGI server.
  • FastAPIstars50.5k - A very high performance Python 3.6+ API framework based on type hints. Powered by Starlette and Pydantic.

Message Queues

Libraries to implement applications using message queues.

  • aioamqpstars269 - AMQP implementation using asyncio.
  • pyzmqstars3.2k - Python bindings for ZeroMQ.
  • aiozmqstars388 - Alternative Asyncio integration with ZeroMQ.
  • crossbarstars2k - Crossbar.io is a networking platform for distributed and microservice applications.
  • asyncio-natsstars579 - Client for the NATS messaging system.
  • aiokafkastars791 - Client for Apache Kafka.

Database Drivers

Libraries to connect to databases.

  • asyncpgstars5.7k - Fast PostgreSQL Database Client Library for Python/asyncio.
  • asyncpgsastars403 - Asyncpg with sqlalchemy core support.
  • aiopgstars1.3k - Library for accessing a PostgreSQL database.
  • aiomysqlstars1.5k - Library for accessing a MySQL database
  • aioodbcstars250 - Library for accessing a ODBC databases.
  • motorstars2k - The async Python driver for MongoDB.
  • aioredisstars2.2k - aio-libs Redis client (PEP 3156).
  • asyncio-redisstars548 - Redis client for Python asyncio (PEP 3156).
  • aiocouchdbstars53 - CouchDB client built on top of aiohttp (asyncio).
  • aioinfluxstars157 - InfluxDB client built on top of aiohttp.
  • aioesstars97 - Asyncio compatible driver for elasticsearch.
  • peewee-asyncstars662 - ORM implementation based on peeweestars9.5k and aiopg.
  • GINOstars2.5k - is a lightweight asynchronous Python ORM based on SQLAlchemy core, with asyncpgstars5.7k dialect.
  • Tortoise ORMstars3.2k - native multi-backend ORM with Django-like API and easy relations management.
  • Databasesstars3.1k - Async database access for SQLAlchemy core, with support for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite.

Networking

Libraries to communicate in your network.

  • AsyncSSHstars1.3k - Provides an asynchronous client and server implementation of the SSHv2 protocol.
  • aiodnsstars465 - Simple DNS resolver for asyncio
  • httpxstars9.5k - asynchronous HTTP client for Python 3 with requestsstars48.4k compatible API.

GraphQL

Libraries to build GraphQL servers.

  • Ariadne - Schema-first Python library for implementing GraphQL servers.
  • Tartiflette - Schema-first Python 3.6+ GraphQL engine built on top of libgraphqlparser.

Testing

Libraries to test asyncio based applications.

  • aiomockstars23 - A python mock library that supports async methods.
  • asyncteststars301 - Enhance the standard unittest package with features for testing. asyncio libraries
  • pytest-asynciostars1k - Pytest support for asyncio.
  • aresponsesstars93 - Asyncio http mocking. Similar to the responsesstars3.7k library used for requestsstars48.4k
  • aioresponsesstars384 - Helper for mock/fake web requests in Python aiohttp package.

Alternative Loops

Alternative asyncio loop implementations.

  • uvloopstars8.9k - Ultra fast implementation of asyncio event loop on top of libuv.

Misc

Other awesome asyncio libraries.

  • aiocachestars745 - Cache manager for different backends.
  • aiofilesstars2k - File support for asyncio.
  • aiodebugstars56 - A tiny library for monitoring and testing asyncio programs.
  • aiorunstars336 - A run() function that handles all the usual boilerplate for startup and graceful shutdown.
  • aioserialstars106 - A drop-in replacement of pySerialstars2.7k.
  • aiozipkinstars177 - Distributed tracing instrumentation for asyncio with zipkin
  • asgirefstars1.1k - Backend utils for ASGI to WSGI integration, includes sync_to_async and async_to_sync function wrappers.
  • ruiastars1.6k - An async web scraping micro-framework based on asyncio.

Writings

Documentation, blog posts, and other awesome writing about asyncio.

  • Official asyncio documentation - Asynchronous I/O, event loop, coroutines and tasks.
  • Short well-written intro to asyncio - Generators, Coroutines, Native Coroutines and async/await.
  • AsyncIO for the Working Python Developer - A gentle introduction to asynchronous programming from basic examples working up to URL fetching.
  • Test limits of Python aiohttp - Making 1 million requests with python-aiohttp.
  • ASGI (Asynchronous Server Gateway Interface) - A spiritual successor to WSGI, intended to provide a standard interface between async-capable Python web servers, frameworks, and applications.
  • First Principles Introduction to Asyncio - A no-buzzword first principles introduction to the internal workings of asyncio.
  • Developing and Testing an Asynchronous API with FastAPI and Pytest - This tutorial looks at how to develop and test an asynchronous API with FastAPI using Test-Driven Development (TDD).
  • Python Concurrency with asyncio - Learn how to speed up slow Python code with concurrent programming and the cutting-edge asyncio library.

Talks

Recordings of awesome talks about asyncio.

  • Topics of Interest (Python Asyncio) | screencast | slides - PyCon Brasil 2015 keynote (David Beazley).
  • Python Asynchronous I/O Walkthrough | blog post - 8-part code walkthrough (Philip Guo).
  • Async/await in Python 3.5 and why it is awesome - EuroPython 2016 (Yury Selivanov).
  • Fear and Awaiting in Async: A Savage Journey to the Heart of the Coroutine Dream | screencast - PyOhio 2016 keynote (David Beazley).
  • Asynchronous Python for the Complete Beginner | slides - PyCon 2017 (Miguel Grinberg).
  • Demystifying Python's Async and Await Keywords - JetBrains TV 2020 (Michael Kennedy)

Alternatives to asyncio

Alternative approaches to async programming in Python, some of which attempt to support some compatibility with asyncio, others are not compatible at all.

  • curiostars3.9k - The coroutine concurrency library.
    • Curio-Asyncio Bridge - basic curio -> asyncio coroutine bridge
  • triostars4.9k - Pythonic async I/O for humans and snake people.
    • trio-asynciostars163 - re-implementation of the asyncio mainloop on top of Trio
